Home.heroTitle: Correct Planning, Strong Execution, Reliable Results
Home.aboutDesc: We operate in the fields of industrial and residential projects, land-for-construction applications, and construction contracting services.
Home.servicesTitle: We Offer a Range of Services to Meet All Types of Needs

About.title: About Us
About.storyP1: Casa Di Pietra Yapı Group manages all steps from project development to turnkey completion in commercial and residential construction projects with its professional teams.
About.storyP2: Our commitment to excellence and high-quality workmanship has made us a leader in the sector. We are proud of our ability to manage complex projects from start to finish.
About.storyP3: With 7 large-scale projects completed to date, we have established a reliable application experience on a regional scale.
About.storyP4: We ensure safety, quality, and transparency by taking full responsibility in every project.
About.missionDesc: At CASA YAPI GROUP, we prioritize sustainable construction practices that minimize environmental impact while maximizing long-term value for our clients and communities.

testimonials.name: Kamuran Doğan Yıldız
testimonials.text: CASA YAPI GROUP transformed our vision into reality. Their attention to detail and commitment to deadlines is unparalleled in the industry.

testimonials.name: Cafer Gençtürk
testimonials.text: The team's professional approach to site management and quality control made our complex infrastructure project a smooth success.

testimonials.name: Halil İbrahim Yılmaz
testimonials.text: Reliability is hard to find, but CASA YAPI GROUP delivers it every time. They are our go-to partner for all commercial developments.

Services.label: OUR SERVICES
Services.title: We Offer Options Tailored to Your Needs

INDUSTRIAL FACILITY PROJECTS.title: INDUSTRIAL FACILITY PROJECTS
INDUSTRIAL FACILITY PROJECTS.desc: Specialized engineering and construction solutions for manufacturing plants, warehouses, and complex industrial complexes.

RESIDENTIAL PROJECTS.title: RESIDENTIAL PROJECTS
RESIDENTIAL PROJECTS.desc: From luxury villa complexes to modern apartment buildings, we create high-quality living spaces tailored for comfort and durability.

CONSTRUCTION CONTRACTING SERVICES.title: CONSTRUCTION CONTRACTING SERVICES
CONSTRUCTION CONTRACTING SERVICES.desc: Professional project management and execution services, delivering complex projects on time and within budget through expert craftsmanship.

LAND VALUATION SERVICES.title: LAND VALUATION SERVICES
LAND VALUATION SERVICES.desc: Expert appraisal and feasibility studies to determine the highest and best use for land investments and urban development.

LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION.title: LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION
LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION.desc: Transforming outdoor spaces with aesthetic and functional landscaping solutions, integrating natural beauty with architectural precision.

SUSTAINABLE AND ECOLOGIC.title: SUSTAINABLE AND ECOLOGIC
SUSTAINABLE AND ECOLOGIC.desc: Environmentally conscious building practices and green technologies designed to minimize carbon footprint and maximize energy efficiency.

PROPERTY & COMPLEX MANAGEMENT.title: PROPERTY & COMPLEX MANAGEMENT
PROPERTY & COMPLEX MANAGEMENT.desc: Professional administrative, technical, and social management services for residential complexes and commercial properties, ensuring premium living standards.

ENGINEERING SERVICES.title: ENGINEERING SERVICES
ENGINEERING SERVICES.desc: Advanced structural and civil engineering solutions providing technical excellence for the most challenging architectural visions.

konya-artma-tesisi-betonarme-isleri.title: Konya Water Treatment Plant
konya-artma-tesisi-betonarme-isleri.desc: Concrete and structural works for a state-of-the-art water treatment facility implemented with advanced engineering solutions.

kusadas-konut-projesi.title: Kuşadası Residential Project
kusadas-konut-projesi.desc: A coastal residential development in Kuşadası, merging modern architecture with seaside comfort.

kusadas-otel-projesi.title: Kuşadası Hotel Project
kusadas-otel-projesi.desc: Comprehensive hotel construction project focusing on luxury, aesthetics, and high-end guest experience.

kusadas-ticari-alan-projesi-avm.title: Kuşadası Commercial Center (Mall)
kusadas-ticari-alan-projesi-avm.desc: Modern commercial and shopping mall project located in the heart of Kuşadası.

kusadas-villa-projesi.title: Kuşadası Villa Project
kusadas-villa-projesi.desc: Tailor-made luxury villa project integrated with nature, offering exclusive living spaces.
